info: Version 8.33.0 adds full Hyperliquid HyperEVM support — the native HYPE coin plus the WHYPE, PURR, USDC, and USDT0 tokens — with WalletConnect and FIO handle support, a BitcoinZ Canopy sending fix, and Buy/Sell history polish.
bugs: BitcoinZ Sending: Updated the transaction library for BitcoinZ's Canopy hard fork, so BTCZ sends are signed with the correct consensus branch ID and accepted by the network.
Buy/Sell History: Fixed the transaction-details popup so its content is left-aligned when opened directly from the Buy and Sell crypto screens.
Various UI/UX improvements and stability fixes
Performance optimizations and general bug fixes
features: Hyperliquid HyperEVM: Added support for the Hyperliquid HyperEVM network and its native HYPE coin, including send, receive, and balance/transaction history.
HyperEVM Tokens: Added the WHYPE, PURR, USDC, and USDT0 tokens on Hyperliquid HyperEVM.
WalletConnect & FIO: Hyperliquid HyperEVM is now available over WalletConnect and supported by FIO Crypto Handles.
